Description: Create ~/Projects/gnosis root directory
Create raw/articles/, raw/pdfs/, raw/notes/, raw/assets/ with .gitkeep files
Create wiki/sources/, wiki/entities/, wiki/concepts/, wiki/queries/ with .gitkeep files
Draft the schema file: identity, session start protocol, ingest/query/lint workflows, page conventions, log format, index format, naming rules
One-paragraph project description + instructions to start a Claude session and ingest
Empty index with four section headers: Sources, Entities, Concepts, Queries
Empty log with header comment describing the format
Ignore .DS_Store and optionally raw/assets/* for large binaries
Initialize git repo and commit scaffolding
Paste URL of a recently-read article; Claude should fetch, discuss, write summary, create 2-4 entity/concept pages, update index.md, append log
Confirm source page has [[links]] to entity/concept pages and vice versa
Ingest a second source that overlaps topically; Claude should UPDATE existing entity pages, not duplicate; add cross-refs between sources
Ask a question that requires combining both sources; answer should cite [[page]] links
Confirm query answer can be filed back to wiki/queries/ and indexed
Run `grep '^## \[' log.md | tail -5` and confirm clean chronological entries
Optional: open ~/Projects/gnosis as an Obsidian vault, check graph view renders connected nodes
Drop in your first real article/PDF/note and run a full interactive ingest
Read generated wiki pages; note what's good, what's missing, what feels wrong
Refine schema based on observations (page structure
Commit updated CLAUDE.md with rationale in commit message
Decide weekly/daily/ad-hoc; document in CLAUDE.md if it affects workflow
After ~10 sources, run a lint check: contradictions, orphans, undefined concepts
Read the lint report; decide which orphans deserve cross-references or deletion
Optional: Dataview, Marp, Templater if you want Obsidian-native features
Browser extension to clip web articles directly into raw/articles/
Obsidian hotkey (Ctrl+Shift+D) to download inline article images to raw/assets/
When wiki exceeds ~50 sources, benchmark index.md reads vs qmd BM25/vector search
If qmd wins, install CLI + MCP server so Claude can search natively
If you want to generate slides from wiki content, configure Marp plugin
If you want dynamic tables from YAML frontmatter, install Dataview
